product: project-management SaaS (similar to Asana or Monday.com)
summary: The customer uses the project management tool for nearly all their tasks and is in it every day, but finds it just

highlights.claim: The customer struggles with the notification system, finding it overwhelming and difficult to filter
highlights.quote: I think it's just... there are so many different types of notifications, and they all kind of blend together after a while.

highlights.claim: The customer feels that the tool is expensive and not sure if it's worth the cost
highlights.quote: I mean, it's pretty expensive, if you ask me.

highlights.claim: The customer is unsure if they would recommend the tool to others due to their frustrating experience
highlights.quote: And, honestly, if someone asked me, I'm not sure I would really recommend it to them.
